sub_mechanisms: M_1: view each per-head attention matrix A_h as an operator and compute Tr(A_h^*A_h)^{1/2} (nuclear norm)
M_2: compute Tr(A_h A_h^*)^k for k=1,2,3 (trace, second moment, third moment)
M_3: stack the three moments into a 3-vector per head and rank heads by joint quantile in this 3-space
M_4: prune the lowest 30% of heads by joint quantile
stripped_llm_application: Attention-head pruning using nuclear-norm and higher cumulant traces of per-head attention matrices as a multi-moment importance score.
stripping_rule_applied: removed: Murray-von-Neumann, II_1 factor, C*-algebra (kept 'trace' and 'nuclear norm' as standard linear-algebra terms)
